title: Money Matters
summary: This article continues the discussion started in Mining Magazine 's February 2006 article " African Lessons " (.pdf) about Calestous Juma's efforts "to improve indigenous management and entrepreneurial skills in Africa".
body: Note This article continues the discussion started in Mining Magazine 's February 2006 article " African Lessons " (.pdf) about Calestous Juma's efforts "to improve indigenous management and entrepreneurial skills in Africa".
